subcodes.first_line: O Haydar! Thy tablet hath attained unto the Divine Throne, and whatsoever thou didst mention therein hath been honoured by the hearing of the Best-Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حیدر کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و آنچه ذکر نموده بودی بشرف اصغای حضرت محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
